variants: Marjeta Pavlic is currently employed at Nova Drift Corporation, where she applies the legal knowledge acquired during her studies at Umbercliff School of Law. In addition to her professional work, Marjeta is a committed Volunteer for Sunhouse Teaching Fellows, contributing her time to educational initiatives. Her proficiency in Korean Hangul enhances her communication skills in her diverse workplace. Moreover, Marjeta has seen her work published at Hearthlit Maple Press, showcasing her talents as a writer. Altogether, her career reflects a balance of legal expertise, community service, and creativity.
